metadata.description: ALDC — AI-Native AL Development Collection for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central. Agents, skills, workflows, and coding standards for extension-only development.

plugins.name: aldc
plugins.description: AL agents (incl. on-demand triage + dredd audit) + TDD subagents, skills, and workflows for BC extension development with TDD, BCQuality-cited review, event-driven architecture, and HITL gates.
